MODULE: cosmos.infrastructure.terraform_manager
FILE: cosmos/infrastructure/terraform_manager.py (598 lines)
CATEGORY: infrastructure

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Terraform Manager

"I've terraformed Mars! ...Well, a virtual Mars. In code."

Comprehensive Terraform integration for Infrastructure as Code management.

CLASSES:
- TerraformAction(Enum): Terraform action types.
- ResourceChange: A single resource change in a plan.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- TerraformPlan: Terraform plan result.
  Methods: def summary(self) -> Dict[str, int]
- TerraformState: Terraform state information.
- TerraformWorkspace: Terraform workspace.
- TerraformManager: Comprehensive Terraform management for cosmos.

Features:
- Workspace management
  Methods: def create_workspace(self, name: str, source_path: Path=None, backend: str='local', backend_config: 
  Methods: def get_workspace(self, name: str) -> Optional[TerraformWorkspace]
  Methods: def list_workspaces(self) -> List[TerraformWorkspace]
  Methods: def delete_workspace(self, name: str, destroy_first: bool=True) -> bool
  Methods: async def init(self, workspace: TerraformWorkspace, upgrade: bool=False, reconfigure: bool=False) ->
  Methods: async def validate(self, workspace: TerraformWorkspace) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def plan(self, workspace: TerraformWorkspace, save_plan: bool=True, target: str=None, var_over
  Methods: async def apply(self, workspace: TerraformWorkspace, plan: TerraformPlan=None, auto_approve: bool=Fa
